title: kInorA
subtitle: Personalized training powered by AI
hero_subtitle: kInorA listens to you, builds your routine, and adjusts it every week based on your progress. Train with a plan that evolves with you, not a generic one.
trust_desc_schedule: Set the days you can train and the AI reorganizes your week.
trust_desc_level: From beginner to advanced, with progressive overload.
trust_desc_equipment: Train at home, in the park, or at the gym.
trust_desc_hands: Control your session by voice while you train.
hiw_title: From your goal to your routine in three steps
hiw_subtitle: No generic templates. Tell kInorA what you want to achieve and it builds a custom plan that improves with you.
hiw_step1_desc: Speak or type: gain strength, lose fat, run farther. The AI learns your level, availability, and equipment.
hiw_step2_desc: In seconds you get a weekly routine with exercises, sets, reps, and rest designed for you.
hiw_step3_desc: Log your sessions and the AI adjusts loads and volume so you keep progressing without plateauing.
features_title: Everything you need, in one app
features_subtitle: The tools a personal trainer would give you, available every day at any hour.
features_adaptive_desc: Routines that readjust each week based on your progress, fatigue, and actual availability.
features_voice_desc: Mark sets, request an exercise change, or start your rest timer without touching the screen.
features_tracking_desc: Rest timer, set logging, and exercise guidance throughout your entire session.
features_stats_desc: Visualize your volume, strength, and consistency with clear, easy-to-read charts.
pricing_title: Start free, grow when you're ready
pricing_subtitle: No commitment. Change or cancel your plan anytime from the app.
pricing_team_feat1: Everything in Pro for your team
cta_subtitle: Create your plan in under a minute. Free, no credit card.
footer_tagline: The AI coach that builds your plan, adjusts it every week, and trains with you.
